templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: If you need to cancel your order for any reason, there is a 1-hour window after the order is placed to cancel orders. Once this window has passed, you can return your order by mail or at any store, or exchange your item(s) at a store after your order arrives. View full cancellation instructions here: https://www.famousfootwear.com/help/cancel-order

templates.name: When do my reward points expire?
templates.content: Reward Cash has different expiration dates depending on when it was earned. The expiration date will be on the Reward Cash when it is issued.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/famousfootwear/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/famousfootwear

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We are proud to offer a 10% discount to all active, reserve, and retired members of the U.S. Armed Forces at Famous Footwear and Famous Footwear Outlet stores. Unfortunately, the military discount isn't valid online, only in store with a valid active, reserve, or retired government-issued military I.D. card.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://www.famousfootwear.com/stores?icid=ftr_store_click_storefinder

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We usually ship via FedEx or FedEx SmartPost and, once shipped, orders will take 3-5 business days to arrive.

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.famousfootwear.com/track-order

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.famousfootwear.com/shipping-and-returns

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-888-869-1053 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Register here - https://www.famousfootwear.com/account/registration or through our app - https://www.famousfootwear.com/mobile-app

templates.name: Sizing (shoes)
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Shoe fits can vary depending on the manufacturer, but you can always go to a local store and get help from our Sizing Expert to make sure. You can find a store near you here: https://www.famousfootwear.com/stores If you can't make it to the store, you can make use of our printable size charts here: https://www.famousfootwear.com/shoe-size-charts?icid=ftr_hlpme_click_shoesizecharts

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on all orders by FAMOUSLY YOU REWARDS Members or orders over $75 for non-members . Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to use this form to contact my team directly: https://famousfootwear.custhelp.com/app/ask Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: SUPERSTAR member rewards
templates.content:
Members enjoy all STAR benefits, plus:
- Faster Rewards: Earn 50% more points than STAR members with 1.5 points per dollar.
- The Most Birthday Rewards: $10 Birthday Reward Cash - our biggest gift!
- Extras When You Want: Enjoy an Extra 3X Bonus Points Day to use when you want.

templates.name: Discount exclusions
templates.content: Some items are not eligible for discounts, such as Birkenstock, Bogs, or Converse shoes. For a list of more exclusions and terms, please have a look at this page: https://www.famousfootwear.com/exclusions

templates.name: PO Boxes
templates.content: We offer standard shipping to P.O. boxes in the continental US for most items; some online-only items are not eligible. Unfortunately, we cannot deliver to P.O. Boxes in Alaska or Hawaii at this time.

templates.name: Redeem rewards points
templates.content:
On our website, be sure you are signed into your account. Once on your Account page, go to the Rewards tab and click on the Reward Cash you want to redeem, then click Apply to Cart. You can also apply Reward Cash from cart or checkout.

In our app, tap the Reward Cash you want to redeem and either add it to your wallet, apply it to your cart, or show it to a store associate at checkout.

At your store, simply show your Reward Cash to the store associate (printed out or on your phone) or ask them to apply it for you at checkout.
